Author: Mohammed Anwar Kabeer
Review Text: When ever I pray salah I feel very nice in shayba masjid.A soulful recitation of qumran by the Imaam takes me in to another world

Author: Tauseef raza Syed
Review Text: All praise to god. It's only big mosque in shaybah since 10 years

Author: Zubair Jaffer Mohammed (Mzj)
Review Text: One of the best Qir'at I've ever heard. Similar to Mishary Rashaid. Subhanallah! Mashallah ❤️

Author: Bin Saeed
Review Text: Best Quran Reciter,peaceful place in shaybah desert.....

Author: Ganesh Potphode
Review Text: Nice architecture and specially built for Aramco Shaybah compound.

Author: Kaka shah Mesrri
Review Text: MASha ALLAH ji so beautiful place

Author: AYIED ALQAHTANI
Review Text: The mosque is large and has been repainted, but it needs new upholstery as the existing furniture is somewhat old and needs replacing.  The ablution facilities are good and adequate.  There is more than one muezzin and imam.  The Friday sermon and prayer last approximately 15 minutes.
